message:
feat(parity): EdgeView set algebra for Graph and DiGraph

Closes franken_networkx-6r4x.

Adds __or__, __and__, __sub__, and __xor__ methods to:
- EdgeView (Graph, in Rust)
- _DiGraphEdgeView (DiGraph, in Python)

Both graph classes now support set operations on edges:
  G.edges | {('c', 'd')}  # union
  G.edges & {('a', 'b')}  # intersection
  G.edges - {('a', 'b')}  # difference
  G.edges ^ {('a', 'b')}  # symmetric difference

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -338,6 +338,18 @@ def __call__(self, nbunch=None, data=False, default=None):
                     result.append((source, target, attrs.get(data, default)))
         return result
 
+    def __or__(self, other):
+        return set(self()) | set(other)
+
+    def __and__(self, other):
+        return set(self()) & set(other)
+
+    def __sub__(self, other):
+        return set(self()) - set(other)
+
+    def __xor__(self, other):
+        return set(self()) ^ set(other)
+
 
 def _digraph_edges(self):
     return _DiGraphEdgeView(self)
